Navigation Map Part 1

Home + Discover + My Bar

Complete UI/UX walkthrough showing every screen from the FigJam flow chart, organized by branch. Click any screen to enlarge. Every FigJam node is mapped and covered.

Home Screen

Main dashboard with AI suggestions, recent drinks, quick craft carousel, and station status widget

Recent Drinks
Quick Craft Carousel

Level 2 — Tap Actions from Home

Recipe Detail

Tap any drink card → full recipe with ingredients, story, similar drinks, and reviews link

Ingredients
Story
Similar Drinks

Customize Drink

Adjust ingredient quantities, select glass type, add personal notes before crafting

Ingredient Sliders
Glass Type
Notes

Craft Confirmation

Final review before pouring. Shows ingredients, station status, and estimated time

Craft Now
Customize
Level 3 — Pour Flow

Active Pour

Live progress ring showing current ingredient being poured with step indicators

Progress Ring
Step Indicators

Drink Complete

Celebration screen with garnish tips, tasting notes, rating stars, share + save

Station Branch (from Home Widget)

Full station view with bottle slots, stats, and action buttons for clean/maintenance

Discover Tab — Complete Flow
Entry Point

Discover Screen

Browse all cocktails with AI picks carousel, search bar with voice input, category filters, and trending grid

AI Picks For You
Search Bar + Voice
Categories Row
Trending Section
Level 2 — From Discover Actions

Trending Recipes Grid

"See all" on Trending → full-page grid of what the community is crafting right now

Full Grid
Ratings

Search Results

Type or voice search → rich card grid with tags, times, and ingredient counts

Active Search
Card Grid

Category Results

Tap a category filter → filtered grid with sub-category pills (e.g. Bourbon, Rye, Scotch)

Sub-filters
Filtered Grid
Level 3 — Recipe Detail Branch

Recipe Detail

Full recipe from any grid card → ingredients, story, and links to similar drinks + reviews

Similar Drinks

AI-powered flavor profile matching with percentage scores (98% Negroni, 92% Old Pal, etc.)

Match %
Flavor Profile

Reviews

Community ratings with 5-star breakdown bars and verified crafter review cards

Rating Summary
Review Cards
Level 3 → Customize & Craft (same as Home branch)

Customize Drink

Ingredient sliders, glass type, notes → Craft Confirmation → Active Pour → Drink Complete

My Bar Tab — Complete Flow
Entry Point

My Bar Screen

Personal hub with four sections: Drink History, Favorites, My Recipes, and Station Overview

Drink History
Favorites
My Recipes
Station Overview
Level 2 — From My Bar Sections

Full History List

"See all" on Drink History → chronological list with date groups, ratings, and filters

Date Groups
Filters
Ratings

Create New Recipe

"+ New Recipe" → form with name, description, category, ingredients list, and save

Details Panel
Ingredients Panel

Station Detail

"Stations" button → bottle slots, station info, clean + maintenance actions

Level 3 — Station Sub-Screens

Bottle Slots

Manage all 6 slots with level bars, replace/history actions, and empty slot assignment

Level Bars
Replace
Assign

Cleaning Cycle

3-step cleaning flow: Flush Lines → Rinse Nozzles → Air Dry with live progress

Step Progress
Timer

Station Maintenance

System health dashboard: pump status, sensors, line cleanliness, device info, firmware

System Health
Device Info
Actions
Level 3 — Drink History → Recipe Detail (same as Home branch)

Recipe Detail

Tap any history/favorite item → full recipe → Customize → Craft → Pour → Complete
